panels.description: Feature vector row count within selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM ml_feature_vector_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)

panels.title: ML Feature Rows

panels.description: Latest ML alert probability from ml_prediction_result.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(prob_alert,0) * 100, 2) AS value FROM ml_prediction_result WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Latest Alert Probability

panels.description: Mapped from predicted_risk_status assuming normal/warning/alert values.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT CASE LOWER(predicted_risk_status)
  WHEN 'normal' THEN 0
  WHEN 'warning' THEN 1
  WHEN 'alert' THEN 2
  ELSE -1
END AS value
FROM ml_prediction_result
WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Latest Predicted Risk Status

panels.description: Latest actual_risk_score stored with prediction results.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(actual_risk_score,0), 3) AS value FROM ml_prediction_result WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Latest Actual Risk Score

panels.description: Scenario experiment rows within selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)

panels.title: Scenario Rows

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(predicted_alert_prob,0) * 100, 2) AS value FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, scenario_run_id DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Use this first if a panel shows no data after ML backfill.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 'ml_feature_vector_day' AS dataset, COUNT(*) AS row_count, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt
FROM ml_feature_vector_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ml_prediction_result' AS dataset, COUNT(*) AS row_count, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt
FROM ml_prediction_result WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'scenario_experiment_result_day' AS dataset, COUNT(*) AS row_count, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt
FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)

panels.title: ML Table Availability

panels.description: Distribution of labels used for ML learning.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT target_risk_status, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM ml_feature_vector_day
WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
GROUP BY target_risk_status
ORDER BY FIELD(target_risk_status,'alert','warning','normal'), cnt DESC

panels.title: Target Risk Status Distribution

panels.description: Matches the validation query supplied for ml_prediction_result.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT dt, predicted_risk_status, prob_alert, actual_risk_status, actual_risk_score
FROM ml_prediction_result
WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
ORDER BY dt DESC
LIMIT ${topn}

panels.title: Latest Prediction Summary

panels.description: Compare actual_risk_score against alert probability scaled by 100.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT dt AS time, 'actual_risk_score' AS metric, actual_risk_score AS value
FROM ml_prediction_result
WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
UNION ALL
SELECT dt AS time, 'prob_alert_x100' AS metric, prob_alert * 100 AS value
FROM ml_prediction_result
WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Prediction vs Actual Risk Score

targets.rawSql:
SELECT dt AS time, predicted_risk_status AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value
FROM ml_prediction_result
WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
GROUP BY dt, predicted_risk_status
ORDER BY time

panels.description: Matches the validation query supplied for scenario_experiment_result_day.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT dt, scenario_name, risk_score_v3, predicted_alert_prob, predicted_label, root_cause_top1
FROM scenario_experiment_result_day
WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
ORDER BY dt DESC, scenario_run_id DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Scenario Experiment Result

panels.description: Shows scenario risk score and predicted alert probability together.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT dt AS time, CONCAT(scenario_name,'_risk_score_v3') AS metric, risk_score_v3 AS value
FROM scenario_experiment_result_day
WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
UNION ALL
SELECT dt AS time, CONCAT(scenario_name,'_pred_alert_x100') AS metric, predicted_alert_prob * 100 AS value
FROM scenario_experiment_result_day
WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Scenario Risk vs Predicted Alert

panels.description: Quick schema and sample-value check for the feature table.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT *
FROM ml_feature_vector_day
WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
ORDER BY dt DESC
LIMIT 3

panels.title: Feature Vector Sample

panels.description: Full prediction detail in the selected range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT dt, predicted_risk_status, prob_alert, actual_risk_status, actual_risk_score
FROM ml_prediction_result
WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
ORDER BY dt DESC

panels.title: Prediction Detail

options.content:
**How to read this dashboard**

- Start with **ML Table Availability** to confirm the ML backfill populated all required tables.
- If **Target Risk Status Distribution** is dominated by `normal`, the model may still behave like a weak fallback classifier.
- Compare **Prediction vs Actual Risk Score** to see whether `prob_alert` moves with stored `actual_risk_score`.
- Use **Scenario Experiment Result** to confirm ML outputs are linked back to scenario simulation results.
- `predicted_risk_status`, `prob_alert`, `actual_risk_status`, `actual_risk_score`, and scenario columns were aligned to the SQL checks you provided.

list.definition: SELECT profile_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM ml_feature_vector_day UNION SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM ml_prediction_result UNION SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM scenario_experiment_result_day) a ORDER BY profile_id
list.label: profile_id
list.name: profile_id
list.query: SELECT profile_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM ml_feature_vector_day UNION SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM ml_prediction_result UNION SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM scenario_experiment_result_day) a ORDER BY profile_id

dashboard.title: ML Backfill Monitoring - Prediction and Scenario Review v2
